title: Bloomings
body_text:
Here's what I found across both codebases:

Shared infrastructure: Both have utils/settings.py, utils/logger.py, graphics/Theme.py — same patterns, likely diverged similarly.

3. Shared Utils
Same story for settings.py, logger.py, Theme.py — consolidate into the shared package so changes to the TOML contract or theme metaclass don't need double maintenance.

Utils consolidation third — settings, logger, Theme
